summary: Completed testing of Iteration 24 features: Claude unified probabilities as single source of truth. All 8 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified with all required components working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ health check returns scheduler status
Backend: POST /api/matches/{matchId}/fetch-live returns claudePrediction with team1_win_pct and team2_win_pct
Backend: claudePrediction.team1_win_pct + team2_win_pct = 100
Backend: probabilities.source is 'claude'
Backend: probabilities.ensemble matches claudePrediction.team1_win_pct/100
Backend: POST /api/matches/{matchId}/refresh-claude-prediction returns updated claudePrediction
Backend: refresh-claude-prediction returns probabilities with source='claude'
Backend: refresh-claude-prediction uses cached SportMonks data (no re-fetch)
Backend: yetToBat array present with player names
Backend: yetToBowl array present with player names
Backend: claudePrediction has all required fields (predicted_winner, headline, reasoning, momentum, confidence)
Backend: GET /api/matches/{matchId}/state returns cached data with Claude probabilities
Frontend: Live match page loads with data-testid='live-match-page'
Frontend: Fetch Live Scores button triggers POST /api/matches/{matchId}/fetch-live
Frontend: Claude Opus Live Prediction panel visible with data-testid='claude-live-prediction'
Frontend: Claude panel shows team1_win_pct and team2_win_pct (sum to 100)
Frontend: Refresh button visible on Claude panel with data-testid='refresh-claude-btn'
Frontend: Refresh button triggers refresh-claude-prediction API and updates UI
Frontend: No duplicate 'Live Match Prediction' panel (data-testid='live-prediction-panel' not found)
Frontend: Yet to Bat section visible with player names (data-testid='yet-to-bat')
Frontend: Yet to Bowl section visible with player names (data-testid='yet-to-bowl')
Frontend: Scoreboard shows Claude's probabilities (RR% and GT% from probs.ensemble)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py correctly overrides probabilities.ensemble with Claude's team1_win_pct/100 (lines 420-422)
server.py correctly sets probabilities.source='claude' when Claude prediction succeeds
refresh-claude-prediction endpoint correctly uses cached sportmonks data without re-fetching API
LiveMatch.js correctly implements handleRefreshClaude to update matchState with new claudePrediction and probabilities
LiveScoreboard.js correctly displays probs.ensemble * 100 for team probabilities
No duplicate Live Match Prediction panel in LiveMatch.js - only Claude Opus panel exists
useMatchData.js correctly implements refreshClaudePrediction hook calling POST /api/matches/{matchId}/refresh-claude-prediction
test_credentials: No authentication required - open access app
seed_data_creation: None - used existing match ipl2026_009 (RR vs GT) with live SportMonks data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 features fully working: (1) Claude's probability is single source of truth - probabilities.source='claude' and probabilities.ensemble matches claudePrediction.team1_win_pct/100. (2) refresh-claude-prediction endpoint works independently without re-fetching SportMonks API. (3) Duplicate 'Live Match Prediction' panel removed - only Claude Opus Live Prediction panel exists. (4) Yet to Bat and Yet to Bowl sections visible with player names passed to Claude for realistic predictions. Match ipl2026_009 (RR vs GT) is currently live.

claude_unified_probabilities.description: Claude's probability is single source of truth for scoreboard and prediction panel

refresh_claude_prediction.description: POST /api/matches/{matchId}/refresh-claude-prediction refreshes Claude prediction without re-fetching SportMonks
refresh_claude_prediction.verification: Returns updated claudePrediction and probabilities with refreshedAt timestamp

no_duplicate_panel.description: Duplicate 'Live Match Prediction' panel removed from UI
no_duplicate_panel.verification: data-testid='live-prediction-panel' not found, only Claude Opus panel visible

yet_to_bat_bowl.description: Yet to Bat and Yet to Bowl sections visible with player names
yet_to_bat_bowl.verification: data-testid='yet-to-bat' and data-testid='yet-to-bowl' found with player names

scoreboard_claude_probs.verification: LiveScoreboard displays probs.ensemble * 100 which is derived from Claude's team1_win_pct
